name: BankAccount

CircularCounter
code:
struct CircularCounter(Copyable, Movable):
    var value: Int
    var limit: Int
    var wraps: Int

    def __init__(out self, lim: Int):
        self.value = 0
        self.limit = lim
        self.wraps = 0

    def increment(mut self):
        self.value = self.value + 1
        if self.value >= self.limit:
            self.value = 0
            self.wraps = self.wraps + 1

    def current(self) -> Int:
        return self.value

    def cycles(self) -> Int:
        return self.wraps

code:
@fieldwise_init
struct TripleD(Copyable, Movable):
    var a: Float64
    var b: Float64
    var c: Float64

    def last(self) -> Float64:
        return self.c

    def rotate(mut self):
        var t = self.a
        self.a = self.b
        self.b = self.c
        self.c = t

def days_in_month(m: Int, leap: Int) -> Int:
    if m == FEB:
        if leap == 1:
            return 29
        return 28
    return 31

name: reverse_in_place
code:
def reverse_in_place(mut v: List[Float64]):
    var i = 0
    var j = len(v) - 1
    while i < j:
        var t = v[i]
        v[i] = v[j]
        v[j] = t
        i += 1
        j -= 1

code:
def swap_nibbles(b: UInt64) -> UInt64:
    var lo = b & 0x0FULL
    var hi = (b >> 4) & 0x0FULL
    return lo << 4 | hi
